name: The No No Man
short_description: A terrifying Indie horror experience with puzzle-platforming that will keep you on your toes as you find your way through the decrepit house. The only guidance you'll have going forward is your own wit and possibly the world's worst flashlight. But make no mistake, this is HIS house.
detailed_description:
DISCLAIMER: I AM REMOVING THIS GAME FROM STEAM. PLEASE SEE ANNOUNCEMENT. THE GAME IS CURRENTLY EXPERIENCING INCREASED ISSUES WITH THE UPDATED BUILD. EXPECT BUGS AND GLITCHES TO OCCUR. THE BUILD WILL NOT BE REVERTED BECAUSE IT INCLUDES THE ADDED HINTS TO HELP PLAYERS PROGRESS.

You and your family just moved into your new home. Everything seemed fine until dad found that old doll in the basement and now it seems nothing has really felt quite normal since. You all felt safe, until tonight...

The No No Man is a challenging indie horror game with a platforming element that will give you very few hints on your path forward. You wake up in the middle of the night and your entire family is gone. The house feels different. You will have to use your flashlight to make your way through your pitch-black home. Explore rooms and discover items to advance through areas. Use your surroundings and your wit to reach items out of reach. Be careful, you never know what the darkness brings.

And remember, he hates the light!




Controls:

Movement - WASD
Interact - E / Left Mouse
Flashlight - F / Right Mouse
JUMP - Space ( hold for slightly higher jump )
